title: Classic Spaghetti Carbonara
steps: 1. Cook pasta in salted boiling water. 2. Fry guanciale until crispy. 3. Mix eggs with grated cheese. 4. Combine hot pasta with guanciale, then add egg mixture off heat. 5. Toss quickly and serve with extra cheese and black pepper.

title: Homemade Margherita Pizza
steps: 1. Preheat oven to maximum temperature. 2. Roll out dough into circle. 3. Spread crushed tomatoes, add mozzarella pieces. 4. Bake 8-10 minutes until crust is golden. 5. Top with fresh basil and olive oil.

title: Thai Green Curry
steps: 1. Fry curry paste in oil until fragrant. 2. Add coconut milk and bring to simmer. 3. Add chicken and vegetables, cook 15 minutes. 4. Season with fish sauce and sugar. 5. Garnish with Thai basil.

title: Chocolate Lava Cake
steps: 1. Melt chocolate and butter together. 2. Whisk eggs, yolks, and sugar until thick. 3. Fold in chocolate mixture and flour. 4. Pour into buttered ramekins. 5. Bake at 200°C for 12 minutes.
